items.answer: We operate across all Canadian provinces. Our partners travel to where the work is, ensuring the same quality and direct oversight on every project - coast to coast.
items.question: What areas do you serve?

items.answer: We specialize in franchise fit-outs, restaurant builds, medical and dental clinics, office build-outs, and general commercial construction. If it's a commercial space, we build it.
items.question: What types of projects do you take on?

items.answer: One of our partners - personally. We don't delegate to junior PMs or third-party managers. The person who gave you the estimate is the person who runs your build.
items.question: Who manages my project?

items.answer: Yes. We manage the full scope - from initial permitting through to final municipal inspection and occupancy. You don't have to coordinate anything separately.
items.question: Do you handle permits and inspections?

items.answer: Through systems-driven project management, direct partner oversight, and transparent communication. Our track record speaks for itself - 250+ projects delivered on budget.
items.question: How do you ensure projects stay on budget?

items.answer: Ownership. Our partners run every project personally. That means faster decisions, higher accountability, and a finished product we stand behind - because our name is on it.
items.question: What makes Trivex different from other contractors?

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions

seo.title: Commercial Construction Contractor Canada | Franchise & Restaurant Builds | Trivex Group
seo.description: Trivex Group is a partner-operated commercial construction contractor specializing in franchise fit-outs, restaurant builds, medical clinics, and office construction across Canada. 250+ projects delivered on time and on budget.

structuredData.name: Trivex Group Corp
structuredData.description: Partner-operated commercial construction and general contracting firm.

hero.badge: Now Operating Across All Canadian Provinces
hero.description: 50+ completed projects across 8 Provinces. Franchise fit-outs, medical clinics, restaurant builds, and commercial spaces, led personally by the partners, every time.

about.title:
Built by Operators,
for Operators.
paragraphs: Trivex Group Corp was founded on a simple idea: the people who own the company should be the ones running the projects. We're not a firm that hands you off to a junior project manager after signing - our partners are personally involved in every build, every decision, and every handoff.

With over 250 completed projects across Canada, we've built a reputation for doing things the right way - no shortcuts, no compromises, and no excuses. From franchise fit-outs and restaurant builds to medical clinics and commercial spaces, we deliver on time, on budget, and to a standard we'd put our name on.

mmfood.name: M&M Food Market
mmfood.approach: Precision planning and efficient execution allowed the team to deliver a complete transformation in just 5 days - on time and on budget.
mmfood.overview: Rapid store facelift and fit-out for M&M Food Market in Kenora, completed in just 5 days.
mmfood.challenge: Completing a full store facelift within a 5-day window to minimize business disruption.

boustan.name: Boustan
boustan.address: 220 Two Nations Crossing B, Fredericton, NB E3A 0X9
boustan.approach: Partner-led from day one with direct oversight on every trade, ensuring franchise standards and municipal requirements were met simultaneously.
boustan.overview: Full franchise construction for Boustan restaurant in Fredericton, New Brunswick.
boustan.challenge: Coordinating all trades and municipal requirements for a franchise build in a new market.

twinlake.name: Twin Lake Veterinary Hospital
twinlake.address: 1080 Mississaga St W, Orillia, ON L3V 3C8
twinlake.approach: Our partners managed every phase directly - from initial planning through to final inspection. Completed on time and on budget.
twinlake.overview: Complete construction of a 450 sq. ft. clinical space within a 4,500 sq. ft. facility, delivered from base condition to turnkey operational handover.
twinlake.challenge: The clinic required specialized infrastructure including medical-grade plumbing, enhanced ventilation for clinical areas, and sanitation-compliant finishes.

barburrito.overview: Complete commercial construction and fit-out for barBurrito franchise location in Ottawa.
barburrito.challenge: Required full compliance with barBurrito corporate design standards while working within the constraints of the existing retail space.

zoelicious.name: Zoelicious
zoelicious.approach: Direct partner management ensured every trade was coordinated seamlessly, with engineering documentation and a comprehensive 1-year warranty included.
zoelicious.overview: Full commercial construction and fit-out for Zoelicious restaurant in Oakville, including a 1-year warranty provision.
zoelicious.challenge: Coordinating specialized mechanical systems including commercial hood exhaust and gas line installation within a tight retail footprint.

cards.title: Partner-Operated
cards.description: Every project is led personally by one of our partners, not delegated to a junior PM. You work directly with the people who own the company.

cards.title: Coast-to-Coast
cards.description: We operate across 8 Canadian provinces with local knowledge and national reach. Wherever your project is, we're already there.

cards.title: Systems-Driven
cards.description: Our internal systems track every phase, every dollar, and every deadline. Nothing slips through the cracks because nothing is left to chance.

cards.title: Grade #1 Materials
cards.description: We use only top-grade materials on every project. No substitutions, no cutting corners - just quality you can see and feel in the finished product.

cards.title: Faster Decision-Making
cards.description: Because the partners run every project directly, decisions happen in hours - not days. No layers of approval means your project moves faster.

cards.title: Zero Tolerance Safety
cards.description: Safety isn't a checkbox - it's built into how we operate. Our job sites follow strict safety protocols with zero tolerance for shortcuts.

whyTrivex.title: The Difference Is Ownership
whyTrivex.subtitle: We don't send project managers - we show up ourselves. Every project is partner-led from estimate to handoff.

items.name: Mike Constantine
items.quote: Trivex delivered our franchise location three days ahead of schedule. You could tell they cared about the quality as much as we did. Best contractor experience we've had.

items.name: Dr. Sarah Rowa
items.quote: We needed our dental clinic operational within a tight timeline and Trivex made it happen. They understood the unique requirements of a medical build-out and handled everything from permitting to final inspection seamlessly.
